subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #058 The Extent and Limitation of Human Perception
subcodes.first_line: Know that comprehension varies. Its lowest degree consists in the senses of the animal realm
subcodes.first_line_orig: بدان که ادراکات مختلف است ادنی رتبهء ادراکات احساسات حیوانیست
